item.title: How do you think this makes you look good when you are just trying to be sympathetic?#greenscreenvideo

item.title: Replying to @Poppo Locco 🍉 ☘️ yes precisely it’s not just cursed but it’s actively part of the imperial violence that it hides
item.description:

item.title: Do not fall for this illusion that we can do anything just by airstrikes
